heading: Bear Creek, Mississippi
label: 23 Bear Creek, Mississippi
text: Bear Creek in Humphreys, Leflore, and Sunflower Counties, in the State of Mississippi, is declared to be a nonnavigable stream within the meaning of the Constitution and the laws of the United States.The right of Congress to alter, amend, or repeal this section is expressly reserved.
notes: CodificationThe first sentence hereof is section 1 and the last sentence section 2 of act , entitled “An Act declaring Bear Creek in Humphreys, Leflore, and Sunflower counties, Mississippi, to be a nonnavigable stream”.Mar. 3, 1923
